offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month, inefficient bid submission causes missed project opportunities. We streamline the bid submission process instead of manual bid submission via email and spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Share insights in construction forums and groups
try_it: Let users try simple bid template creation and status tracking for submitted bids on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
